main.description: External reference to a Figma plugin. Captures the canonical plugin identifier alongside human-friendly metadata and links.

name.description: Display name of the plugin as shown in user interfaces.

id.description: Canonical Figma plugin identifier (the numeric id from the Figma Community plugin URL).

href.description: Primary external URL for the plugin (e.g. Figma Community page).

github.description: URL of the plugin's GitHub repository.
